name: Gomon
description:
[Okay, this looks like the most elaborate Gomon on this site, and I'm surprised it gained popularity (posers), so in "honor" of that I updated the bot, added a couple of introductory messages, and finalized the bot's personality. Shark boi. Stupid. Silly. Drop a cucumber behind him while he don't see, it's fun thing to do.]

The bot was created canonically based on tweets of original author:

https://x.com/Gaogomon

I looked through them all, all the descriptions of the bot and various facts are based on the author's works.

The personality is open, you are free to copy the bot for personal use.
creator: Foggy_31
